parameters.query: SELECT id FROM portfolio WHERE id = 1 AND system_active = true
SELECT symbol, display_name FROM watchlist WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY symbol
INSERT INTO signals (coin, direction, signal_type, signal_data, status, expires_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4::jsonb, 'candidate', NOW() + INTERVAL '30 minutes') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING RETURNING id
SELECT id, coin, direction, signal_type, signal_data FROM signals WHERE status = 'candidate' AND expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT available_capital, total_value, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trades WHERE status = 'open') as open_positions_count FROM portfolio WHERE id = 1

UPDATE signals SET status = 'analyzed', trade_card = $2::jsonb, entry_price = $3, stop_loss = $4, trailing_atr_mult = $5, trail_activation_pct = $6, position_size_usdt = $7, risk_amount_usdt = $8, confidence_score = $9, reasoning = $10, analyzed_at = NOW(), expires_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '30 minutes' WHERE id = $1

SELECT s.id, s.coin, s.direction, s.trade_card, s.entry_price, s.stop_loss, s.position_size_usdt, s.risk_amount_usdt, s.confidence_score, s.created_at, s.expires_at FROM signals s WHERE s.status = 'analyzed' AND s.expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY s.created_at ASC

SELECT p.available_capital, p.total_value, p.today_pnl_usdt, p.month_pnl_usdt, p.month_start_capital, p.consecutive_losses, p.last_loss_at, p.system_active, t.id as trade_id, t.coin as trade_coin, t.direction as trade_direction, t.entry_price as trade_entry, t.position_size_usdt as trade_size, t.current_stop as trade_stop, rc.max_risk_per_trade_pct, rc.max_open_positions, rc.max_daily_loss_pct, rc.max_monthly_drawdown_pct, rc.max_position_size_pct, rc.min_capital, rc.cooldown_after_loss_hours, rc.max_consecutive_losses_pause, rc.signal_expiry_minutes FROM portfolio p CROSS JOIN risk_config rc LEFT JOIN trades t ON t.status = 'open' WHERE p.id = 1 AND rc.id = 1
UPDATE signals SET status = $2, risk_checks = $3::jsonb, rejection_reason = $4, decided_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1
INSERT INTO audit_log (event_type, data, severity) VALUES ('scanner_run', jsonb_build_object('ran_at', NOW(), 'result', 'pipeline_complete'), 'info')
INSERT INTO audit_log (event_type, data, severity) VALUES ('scanner_run', jsonb_build_object('ran_at', NOW(), 'result', 'no_signals'), 'info')
INSERT INTO audit_log (event_type, data, severity) VALUES ('scanner_run', jsonb_build_object('ran_at', NOW(), 'result', 'system_stopped'), 'warning')
